title: Pentapogon sclerophyllus

It belongs to the subfamily Danthonioideae, a group of grasses characterized by the presence of bristles on the flowers. The genus Pentapogon is part of the tribe Danthonieae, a group of grasses native to Australia and New Zealand. Pentapogon sclerophyllus is a native Australian species, found in a variety of habitats including grasslands and woodlands.
